name: merge-nb
description: Rich Jupyter Notebook Merge Conflict Resolver

mergeNB.ui.hideNonConflictOutputs.description: Hide outputs from cells without conflicts in the conflict resolution view

mergeNB.autoResolve.executionCount.description: Automatically resolve execution count differences by setting to null

mergeNB.autoResolve.kernelVersion.description: Automatically resolve kernel version differences by using current version

mergeNB.autoResolve.stripOutputs.description: Automatically strip outputs from cells with conflicts

mergeNB.autoResolve.whitespace.description: Automatically resolve conflicts when source differences are whitespace-only

mergeNB.ui.showCellHeaders.description: Show cell type, execution count, and cell index in the conflict resolution view

mergeNB.ui.enableUndoRedoHotkeys.description: Enable Ctrl+Z / Ctrl+Shift+Z undo and redo shortcuts in the conflict resolution web UI

mergeNB.ui.showBaseColumn.description: Show the base (common ancestor) branch column in the conflict resolution view. When false, only current and incoming columns are shown.

mergeNB.ui.theme.description: Visual theme for the conflict resolution UI. 'light' provides a light, beige theme inspired by the MergeNB logo. 'dark' provides an inverse dark theme.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.compile-tests: tsc -p tsconfig.json --outDir out --noEmit false --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext --esModuleInterop
scripts.watch-tests: tsc -p tsconfig.json -w --outDir out --noEmit false --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext --esModuleInterop
scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run compile-tests
scripts.pretest:pw: npm run compile && npm run compile-tests
scripts.pretest:vscode: npm run compile && npm run compile-tests
scripts.pretest:e2e: npm run compile && npm run compile-tests
scripts.test:all: npm run test:pw && npm run test:vscode && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:pw:ui: npm run compile && npm run compile-tests && npx playwright test --ui
scripts.test:pw:headed: npm run compile && npm run compile-tests && npx playwright test --headed
scripts.test:pw:debug: npm run compile && npm run compile-tests && npx playwright test --debug
